<?php namespace Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Casts; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\Castable; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\CastsAttributes; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Crypt; class AsEncryptedArrayObject implements Castable { /** * Get the caster class to use when casting from / to this cast target. * * @param array $arguments * @return \Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\CastsAttributes<\Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Casts\ArrayObject<array-key, mixed>, iterable> */ public static function castUsing(array $arguments) { return new class implements CastsAttributes { public function get($model, $key, $value, $attributes) { if (isset($attributes[$key])) { return new ArrayObject(Json::decode(Crypt::decryptString($attributes[$key])), ArrayObject::ARRAY_AS_PROPS); } return null; } public function set($model, $key, $value, $attributes) { if (! is_null($value)) { return [$key => Crypt::encryptString(Json::encode($value))]; } return null; } public function serialize($model, string $key, $value, array $attributes) { return ! is_null($value) ? $value->getArrayCopy() : null; } }; } }
